note: REAL-DEVICE capture via pyatv 0.17.0 ↔ 客厅 / AppleTV14,1 (Apple TV 4K gen3) / 192.168.7.134:49153 / tvOS 26.5 on 2026-05-16. mode=realDevice. Asserts frame structure + phase/identifier ordering (not raw _ns/_x which are non-deterministic). REQUEST-ONLY: on tvOS 26.5 FetchLaunchableApplicationsEvent is UNANSWERED (times out, no reply) — known upstream Apple tvOS-26 regression (pyatv #2823 / HA #168210); pyatv itself fails identically. No app-map response is capturable on this firmware. T10 asserts the request shape only.
